mechanism: Moral development is reduced to one universal ladder
possible_dampener: Model multiple moral dimensions and domain differentiation

mechanism: Care relationship and dependency are undervalued
possible_dampener: Include care reasoning relational orientation and vulnerability

mechanism: Articulated justification is mistaken for moral maturity
possible_dampener: Separate reasoning language from action emotion and care

mechanism: Western liberal abstraction is treated as universal maturity
possible_dampener: Include cultural context and affected community perspectives

mechanism: Authority is treated as developmentally neutral despite unequal power
possible_dampener: Model authority orientation and institutional experience critically

mechanism: Sophisticated reasoning fails to become conduct
possible_dampener: Add moral identity emotion courage and situational pressure in extensions

mechanism: Moral conventional personal and prudential rules are collapsed

possible_dampener: Include dialogue care peer cooperation restorative practice and student voice

mechanism: Developmental theory ignores how marginalized children experience rules and institutions
possible_dampener: Include power history dignity and lived evidence

mechanism: Synthetic or coded stages are treated as real moral worth
possible_dampener: Use outputs only for demonstration and never as personal assessment
